description.value:
The ancestors of the Unicorn wandered the lands learning from the others and creating a culture uniquely their own, synthesizing elements of other cultures with their native heritage. In the years since they have left their mark on history as the best cavalry, with a powerful commitment to diplomacy and justice.

Source: Mechanics/Character_Options/Occupations/Community Compendium/Samurai Clans/Unicorn Clan.md

Category: Community Compendium

Folder: Samurai Clans

Prerequisite: Age 8+

Class Skills: Select 3 from Chakra Control, Climb, Diplomacy, Handle Animal, Iaijutsu Focus, Knowledge (Tactics), Listen, Ride, Sense Motive, Swim.

Feat: Select one from Alertness, Mounted Combat (Mounted Archery, Trample, Ride-By Attack, Spirited Charge), Point Blank Shot (Far Shot, Precise Shot, Rapid Shot, Shot on the Run), Weapon Focus (spear, lance, bow, katana).

Wealth Bonus Increase: +1

Reputation Bonus Increase: +1

Affiliation: If a Unicorn Clan member takes levels in Samurai his skills listed above become part of his Class Skills for Samurai levels. Hi s Reflex save becomes Good, and his Will save becomes Good. All feats listed above become feats he may select from the Bonus Feats granted by the Samurai class.

featOptions: Mounted Combat (Mounted Archery, Trample, Ride-By Attack, Spirited Charge)
Point Blank Shot (Far Shot, Precise Shot, Rapid Shot, Shot on the Run)
